CustomField.description: When TRUE, LoggerNotificationDelivery__c records are persisted for every (match, recipient) tuple - one row per delivery target. Requires Match History Enabled to also be TRUE, since a delivery has a required master-detail parent to a match row.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Store a LoggerNotificationDelivery__c row for each (match, recipient) tuple. Requires Match History Enabled = TRUE.
CustomField.label: Is Delivery History Enabled
